info.title: Pharmaciano API
info.description:
Pharmaciano is a comprehensive pharmaceutical management platform that allows
administrators, organizations, and branch managers to manage users, roles,
organizations, branches, brands, and subscriptions seamlessly. It supports
feature-based access control, secure JWT authentication, and provides
APIs for managing all entities in the system.

bearerAuth.name: Authorization
bearerAuth.description: JWT token WITHOUT 'Bearer ' prefix. Just the token itself.

reorder_recommendation.example: Reorder within 10 days to avoid stock shortage.

forecastFromDate.name: fromDate
forecastFromDate.description: Start date for sales history. Default is last 3 months.

forecastToDate.name: toDate
forecastToDate.description: End date for sales history. Default is today.

brandSearch.name: search
brandSearch.description: Search by brand name or manufacturer

medicineSearch.name: search
medicineSearch.description: Search medicine by name, generic name or barcode (e.g. napa, paracetamol, MED-XXXX)

searchSale.name: search
searchSale.description: Search by invoice number or customer name

post.description:
- Normal users: organization from token
- Super Admin: must provide organizationName

get.description:
Generates AI-powered demand forecasting for medicine batches based on
historical sales, current inventory, and expiry information.

**Default behavior**
- Uses the last **3 months** of sales history when `fromDate` is not provided.
- Predicts the **next 30 days** demand.
- Results are cached in Redis for **1 hour**.

**Normal User**
- Organization and branch are taken automatically from the authenticated user.
- Cannot specify organizationId or branchId.

**Super Admin**
- Can optionally filter by organizationId and branchId.

404.description: No sales history found or medicine not found

post.description: Authenticate a user using email and password and return a JWT token.

- Normal user: organization from token
- Super Admin: must provide organizationName

patch.description:
- Normal user: organization from token
- Super Admin: must provide organizationName

get.description:
**⚠️ Super Admin only** – Exports all collections from the database as a single JSON file.

- The file is automatically downloaded with the name `database-backup.json`.
- Contains all documents from every collection in the database.

additionalProperties.description: Array of documents from a collection

401.description: Unauthorized – No token or invalid token

403.description: Forbidden – User is not a Super Admin

message.example: Only super admin can perform this operation

500.description: Server error – Database connection issue or internal failure

post.description:
- Normal users: organization & branch come from token
- Super Admin: must provide organizationName & branchName

404.description: Organization / Branch / Medicine / Warehouse not found

put.description:
- Normal users: cannot change organization/branch
- Super Admin: can update organizationName & branchName

post.description:
Create manual accounting journal entry.

Rules:
- Debit and Credit account cannot be same
- Super Admin can provide organizationName & branchName
- Normal users use organization & branch from token

400.description: Invalid accounts or same debit/credit account

post.description:
Reverse an existing journal entry.

Rules:
- Already reversed journal cannot be reversed again
- Creates a new reverse journal entry automatically

- Normal users: organization comes from token
- Super Admin: must provide organizationName

put.description:
- Normal users: cannot change organization
- Super Admin: can update organizationName

get.summary: Get list of all active organizations

post.description:
Create purchase request.

- Normal User:
  organization & branch come from token

- Super Admin:
  must provide organizationName & branchName

404.description: Medicine / Supplier / Organization / Branch / Warehouse not found

patch.description: Only pending purchases can be approved

patch.summary: Receive purchase and update inventory batch
patch.description:
Receive approved purchase.
This API:
- updates inventory batch
- calculates subtotal, tax, discount
- creates journal entries
- updates payment & due amount

400.description: Validation failed or invalid purchase status

post.description:
Pay due amount to supplier.

This API:
- creates payable journal entry
- updates paidAmount
- updates dueAmount
- updates paymentStatus

400.description: Payment already clear or exceeds due amount
Validation failed or invalid role ID

get.summary: Get list of all active features

post.description:
Create sale with stock deduction and journal entry.

- Normal User:
  organization & branch come from token

- Super Admin:
  must provide organizationName & branchName

404.description: Organization / Branch / Medicine / Batch not found

put.description:
Update sale with stock rollback and journal reverse entry.

- Normal User:
  cannot update organization or branch

- Super Admin:
  can update organizationName & branchName

404.description: Sale / Medicine / Batch / Account not found

get.description: Generate and download PDF invoice for a sale

get.summary: Get list of all active suppliers
Get all unique names from multiple collections
get.description: Returns distinct (unique) names for organization, branch, role, and warehouse.

404.description: User not found or invalid organization/branch
